monilabs.tooltip.creative_data_multi_des: §7Imbues §r§7your factory with the knowledge of the %s!
§7While this machine is §frunning§7, every §foptical data hatch§7 and §fdata access hatch§7 acts like it has all possible §fresearch§7.
monilabs.tooltip.creative_energy_multi_d: §7Imbues your factory with the power of the %s!
§7While this machine is §frunning§7, all §fenergy containers§7 act like they are full of §fenergy§7.
monilabs.tooltip.hyper_desc: §7An §Iepic machine capable of projecting %s §7for hundreds of missions at once.
monilabs.tooltip.prismatic.0: §7Uses the power of %s to transform items!
monilabs.tooltip.prismatic.2: §7The color state §f§iMUST§7 be §fcorrect§7 for recipes to §frun§7!
monilabs.tooltip.prismatic_core: The heart of the Prismatic Crucible!
monilabs.tooltip.sculk_vat_description.0: §7Uses the power of %s §7from the §2deepest §7depths of the earth to grow organic materials.
monilabs.tooltip.sculk_vat_description.1: §7The further the §foutput hatch §7is from being §fhalf-full§7, the more of the product is lost.
tooltip.monilabs.advanced_microverse_pro: §7An §Iadvanced machine capable of projecting %s for complex missions into the deepest parts of space.
§fHigher tier missions§7 drain a small amount of §fintegrity§7 each. Needs to be §ffed§7 quantum flux to §frestore§7 integrity.
tooltip.monilabs.advanced_microverse_typ: Outputs a redstone signal when the
Microverse projector has projected a specified microverse type.
tooltip.monilabs.basic_microverse_projec: §7A machine capable of projecting %s §7for basic miner missions.
§7Runs §fmicrominer§7 missions to gather resources from the §fmicroverse§7.
§7A microverse §ffirst§7 needs to be projected with a §fspecial mission§7, then resource missions can be run.
tooltip.monilabs.elite_microverse_projec: §7An §Ielite machine capable of projecting special %s §7for exotic missions on a %s scale.
§7Can §fperfectly overclock§7 lower projector §ftier§7 missions §fonce§7 for each §ftier§7 above the §frequired§f mission tier.
tooltip.monilabs.hostile_microverse.1: §7All hostile missions restore §fintegrity§7, required for the microverse to stay active.
tooltip.monilabs.hyperbolic_microverse_p: §7An §Iepic machine capable of projecting %s §7for hundreds of missions at once.
§7Can §fperfectly overclock§7 lower projector §ftier§7 missions §fonce§7 for each §ftier§7 above the §frequired§7 mission tier.
§7Some missions are §fexempt§7 from being able to be §fparalleled§7.
